---
title: Customize
description: Override design tokens via CSS variables. Works the same whether you use the vanilla CSS or the React package.
sidebar:
  order: 2
---

Override design tokens via CSS variables. Works the same whether you use the vanilla CSS or the React package. Browse the available tokens on the [Colors](../colors/) page.

## Override a semantic token

Remap a single role to a different palette tone — or to any color you want. Components will follow automatically.

```css
:root {
  --color-primary: var(--color-green-600);
}
```

## Override a palette tone

Replace a Flexoki tone everywhere it's used (`bg-blue-600`, anything semantic that points at it, your own CSS):

```css
:root {
  --color-blue-600: oklch(0.55 0.18 250);
}
```

## Swap the whole palette

Both blocks are stacked on `:root`. Redefine the palette in your own stylesheet to ship a different brand entirely while keeping every semantic role intact.
